items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog
id: 2cf99489-1a93-5e1f-a636-6588f8fc61fc
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/03
modified: 2026/06/03
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-03T04:17:35Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9749744; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-03, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] Vulnerability - low severity (Risk 4.85/10). [ALERT] CISA KEV CONFIRMED - actively exploited in the wild. Patch immediately. AI confidence: HIGH (72%) - strong data corroboration.

title: SENTINEL APEX — SUSE CVE-2026-41115

status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-41115 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41115
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/03
modified: 2026/06/03
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-41115 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-03T04:17:35Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-41115", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
